name: Eisenhower's Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, and salt.
2. Cream the butter until smooth.
3. Gradually beat in sugar.
4. Add egg yolks one at a time, then vanilla.
5. Alternately add cocoa and the flour mixture with milk.
6. Fold in stiffly beaten egg whites.
7. Pour batter into two greased 9-inch layer cake tins.
8. Bake for 25 minutes at 375°F (190°C).
9. For frosting: Combine 2 egg whites with 1 1/2 cups fine-sifted sugar, salt, and 1/2 teaspoon cream of tartar in a double boiler.
10. Stir until the sugar is dissolved over boiling water.
11. Beat until stiff peaks form, about 6-10 minutes.
12. Add vanilla and beat until thick enough to spread while cooling.
